subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thou didst ask as to the education of children. Those children who, sheltered by the Blessed Tree, have set foot upon the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت یزدان در خصوص تربیت صبیان و تعلیم کودکان سوال نموده بودی اطفالی
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @education of children; moral education
